timingWindow.note: avoid_6_24h: rows with hoursUntilStart in [6, 24) are excluded

evidence.note: buildCounterfactualPolicies defines the Primary COV_CAP counterfactual simulation.

evidence.snippet: const groups = new Map<string, CounterfactualPick[]>(); for (const row of rows) groups.set(row.eventGroupKey, [...]); return [...groups.values()].map((xs) => [...xs].sort(cmp)[0]);
evidence.note: selectCounterfactualOnePerEvent groups by eventGroupKey and takes the top-ranked pick per group.
NBA/NHL avoid regex, applied against league/event_slug/event_key/market_slug.
Combined filter application: timing guard, bad-bucket exclusion, and NBA/NHL exclusion.
counterfactualBadBucket defines the excluded coverage/price bucket (the 'cov cap' behavior).
counterfactualTimingGuard defines the avoid_6_24h timing exclusion.
counterfactualEventGroup derives eventGroupKey from event_slug/event_key, then event_title/title/question, then market_slug, then condition_id.
